SYSTEM_PROMPT: A minimalist studio portrait world focused on extreme close-up photography and dramatic chiaroscuro lighting. The visual style emphasizes sculptural light shaping the face through strong contrast between illuminated areas and deep shadows. Colored light beams, narrow slits of light, and directional studio lighting carve the facial structure, revealing skin texture and facial contours while large portions of the frame remain in darkness or soft gradients. Backgrounds remain minimal or softly colored, allowing lighting and facial geometry to dominate the composition. The aesthetic draws inspiration from editorial fashion photography, modern chiaroscuro portraiture, and graphic studio lighting techniques. Light can appear as narrow bands, strong side illumination, or intersecting colored highlights, producing striking color contrasts and bold negative space. Images prioritize facial detail, sharp focus on eyes and skin texture, and cinematic depth produced by fast lenses and shallow depth of field. The atmosphere is dramatic, elegant, and graphic, where lighting design becomes the primary visual narrative.
LIGHTING: Narrow slit lighting across the face
Magenta and cyan color contrast lighting
OBJECTS: Light beam cutting across the face
